## Checklist

- [ ] TypeScript strict mode passes
- [ ] ESLint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Works on web (localhost:3000)
- [ ] Works on iOS simulator (if UI change)

- [ ] German strings used for user-facing text
